name: create-claw-skill
description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an OpenClaw skill", "make a claw skill", "build a skill for OpenClaw", "write a SKILL.md for openclaw", "add a skill to openclaw", "generate openclaw skill frontmatter", "create a clawhub skill", "port a skill to OpenClaw", "convert a Claude Code skill to claw", "migrate my skill to openclaw", or wants to author a new skill or port an existing Claude Code skill for the pi-coding-agent / OpenClaw ecosystem.
